characters.appearance: Young adult male, slim build, tan complexion. He has short, spiky black hair and dark eyes.
Voice only. Not visible on screen.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: खराब English आपकी job लगने के chances कम कर देती है। [Poor English reduces your chances of getting a job.]
Character A says: लोग आपके बोलते ही आपका confidence judge कर लेते हैं। [People judge your confidence as soon as you speak.]
Character A says: और ये एक myth है कि आप अपनी spoken English improve नहीं कर सकते। [And it's a myth that you cannot improve your spoken English.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing a common fear (job rejection due to poor English).
- Uses a visual metaphor (truth vs myth) to challenge the belief that fluency cannot be learned.
- Sets up the core problem that Supernova will solve.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
English bias is real.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Supernova app से लाखों लोग रोज़ practice करके अपनी English सुधार रहे हैं। [Millions of people are improving their English by practicing daily with the Supernova app.]
Character A says: Comfortable. [Comfortable.]
Character A says: Let's see. [Let's see.]
Character B says: इसे ऐसे बोलें: Com-for-ta-ble. [Say it like this: Com-for-ta-ble.]
Character A says: Comfortable. [Comfortable.]
Character A says: आज ही Supernova download करें और खुद फर्क देखें। [Download Supernova today and see the difference yourself.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as the practical, daily solution for spoken English.
- Demonstrates the AI tutor feature in real-time, showing immediate feedback and improvement.
- Ends with a strong, encouraging call to action to download the app.
